# Hegazy GTM OS 2026

> Executive Growth & Revenue Operating System for Hegazy Aluminium Group — an internal CRM and revenue platform for managing companies, opportunities, and go-to-market execution.

This application is an internal tool. Most surfaces require authentication and are not crawlable.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Entry point that redirects authenticated users to their dashboard.
- [Sign in](/auth): Sign-in and sign-up for authorized Hegazy Aluminium Group team members.
